title: This Man's Navy
writer: Borden Chase, Herman E. Halland, Hugh Allen
actors: Wallace Beery, Tom Drake, James Gleason
plot: Ned Trumpet, the chief pilot of a Navy blimp, is given to weaving accounts of the fighting prowess of his non-existent son. His friendship with widow Maude Weaver and her son Jess in effect sets him up with a real family.
